description: Audio manifest for narrative zones established by Agent #15 in cycle 012. Covers ambient layers, music triggers, and TTS voice line references for all 4 narrative trigger zones.

tts_voice_lines.text: Something is wrong with the air tonight. The forest has gone quiet — no insects, no birds. When the jungle holds its breath like this, it means something large is moving through it. Stay low. Stay still. Do not run.
The kill site is fresh. Blood on the stones, drag marks heading east toward the river. Whatever hunted here — it will return. We cannot camp anywhere near this place tonight.

freesound_references.name: Small Brook Flowing Around Rocks
freesound_references.usage: Primary ambient layer — looping river sound at crossing point

music_layer.note: River crossing is a calm narrative moment — no tension music

ambient_design.note: Kill site should feel unnaturally quiet — predator suppresses ambient fauna

music_layer.description: Sub-bass rumble 40-80Hz, slow pulse at 0.5Hz, no melody

ambient_design.note: Valley entrance is exposed — wind prominent, insects sparse

music_layer.description: High strings tremolo, sparse percussion, builds if player lingers

ambient_design.note: Ridge is elevated — strong wind, echo on voice lines, sparse fauna

music_layer.description: Tribal percussion, bone instruments, building intensity — defensive stand

ambient_design.note: Deep forest baseline — rich insect layer, bird calls, leaf rustle

music_layer.note: Forest interior is safe zone — ambient only, no tension music

freesound_catalogue.name: Waterfall - Xiufeng Waterfall, Taiwan - Ambient Field Recording
freesound_catalogue.note: Use as background layer under insect chorus in deep forest

voice_mixing.outdoor_light: Short pre-delay 15ms, room size 0.2, wet 15% — sounds like open air near trees
voice_mixing.outdoor_open: No reverb, slight high-frequency rolloff — sounds like exposed clearing
voice_mixing.canyon_medium: Pre-delay 40ms, room size 0.6, wet 30%, decay 1.2s — ridge/canyon echo

audio_design_notes.music_philosophy: Music should be invisible. Player must feel danger, not think 'this music is tense'. Use sub-bass and rhythm changes rather than obvious stingers. Silence is a tool — kill site zone should feel wrong because the ambient layer is absent, not because music is loud.
audio_design_notes.fire_once_logic: All TTS voice lines use fire_once_per_session=true. Store trigger state in GameInstance. Reset on new session only, not on respawn.
audio_design_notes.walter_murch_principle: The sound that does not exist is often more powerful than the sound that does. Kill site: remove the insects. The player will feel it before they understand why.

vfx_agent_17: Kill site zone (3000,-1500,120) needs fly particle emitter on ground — small dark flies circling
Valley entrance (0,4000,100) needs heat shimmer VFX — exposed open ground in sunlight
Ridge overlook (-3500,-2000,300) needs wind-blown dust/debris particles
River crossing (-2000,500,100) needs water spray mist particles near crossing point
Deep forest (1500,1500,100) needs floating dust motes in light shafts — dense canopy
